name: EC Economic Sentiment Indicator (EA)
notes: EC headline ESI composite; >100 = above-average confidence. Verified: 552 obs 1980-01 → 2025-12.

name: EC Industry Confidence (EA)
notes: EC industrial confidence sub-indicator; balance of positive minus negative responses. Verified: 552 obs 1980-01 → 2025-12.

name: EC Services Confidence (EA)
notes: EC services confidence sub-indicator; balance of positive minus negative responses. Verified: 369 obs 1995-04 → 2025-12.

name: ISM Manufacturing PMI
notes: ISM headline Manufacturing PMI composite. DB.nomics mirror may lag 4-8 months. Replaces FMP calendar (paywalled 2025-08).

name: ISM Manufacturing New Orders
notes: ISM Manufacturing New Orders sub-index. Most forward-looking PMI component. Replaces FMP calendar.

name: ISM Services PMI (Non-Manufacturing)
notes: ISM Non-Manufacturing headline PMI. Services ~70% of US GDP. Replaces FMP calendar.

name: Eurozone Industrial Production
notes: Total industry excl. construction (NACE B-D). Headline EA20 aggregate via Eurostat teiis080 cube (composite unit I21_SCA).

name: Eurozone Retail Sales Volume (Non-Food ex Fuel)
notes: Volume of sales for retail of non-food products excluding fuel (NACE G47_NFOOD_X_G473). The teiis260 cube is the only EA20 SCA aggregate DBnomics carries for this dataset; total retail incl. food is not exposed at the EA20 level. Short history (2023+).

name: Eurozone Employment
notes: Total employment domestic concept. Cycle-coincident labour market indicator.

name: BoJ Policy Rate
notes: T1 fallback for FRED IRSTCB01JPM156N (frozen 2008-12). IMF IFS Bank of Japan policy rate. Wired §3.1 Stage B 2026-04-30.

name: PBoC Policy Rate
notes: T1 fallback for FRED IRSTCB01CNM156N (frozen 2015-11). IMF IFS PBoC policy rate. Wired §3.1 Stage B 2026-04-30.

name: Eurozone HICP Inflation YoY
notes: T1 fallback for FRED EA19CPALTT01GYM (frozen 2023-01). Eurostat prc_hicp_manr — direct via DB.nomics. Wired §3.1 Stage B 2026-04-30.

name: Germany Industrial Production
notes: T1 fallback for FRED DEUPROINDMISMEI (frozen 2024-03). Eurostat teiis080 cube — same dataset as EZ_IND_PROD with country code DE. Wired §3.1 Stage B 2026-04-30.

name: Eurozone Core HICP YoY (ex energy/food/alcohol/tobacco)
notes: Eurostat HICP overall index excluding energy/food/alcohol/tobacco — the standard ECB core HICP definition. Back to 2001-12 (289 obs verified live 2026-06-10 — 2025-12 = 2.3%). Wired §3.1.3 follow-up: blended into EU_INFL1 alongside EA_HICP headline.

name: Japan Core CPI YoY (ex food & energy)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 national CPI ex-food-and-energy growth rate over 1 year (international core CPI convention; BoJ also publishes ex-fresh-food and ex-fresh-food-and-energy variants). Back to 1956-01 (844 obs verified live 2026-06-10 — 2026-04 = 1.1%). Replaces frozen FRED CPGRLE01JPM659N / OECD MEI mirror (stale at 2021-06). Wired §3.1.3 follow-up: blended into JP_INFL1 alongside JPN_CPI headline.

name: ISM Manufacturing Inventories
notes: ISM Manufacturing Inventories sub-index (Index series). Enables the New Orders minus Inventories leading spread. DB.nomics mirror; verified live 2026-06-15.

name: ISM Manufacturing Prices Paid
notes: ISM Manufacturing Prices Paid sub-index (Index series). Leads producer/consumer prices. DB.nomics mirror; verified live 2026-06-15.

name: China M2 Money Supply (YoY)
notes: DB.nomics NBS/M_A0D01/A0D0102 — National Bureau of Statistics of China: Money & Quasi-Money (M2) Supply, Growth Rate. Despite the NBS column title 'same period last year=100', values are served as YoY percent (e.g. 9.0 @ 2026-02, 8.5 @ 2025-12). Replaces frozen FRED OECD-MEI mirror MYAGM2CNM189N (a stock LEVEL mislabelled "Percent Change YoY", froze 2019-08) and resolves the long-standing China M2 accepted-gap — see manuals/2026-06-17-m2-units-trio-recommendation.md. NBS mirror lags ~4 months (override 120). Verified live 2026-06-17 (9.0% @ 2026-02).
